The decision was communicated during an internal town hall meeting on January 29, 2026. Network18âs Chief Content Officer, Santosh Menon, informed employees that Sharma will formally exit her role but continue with the organisation until March 2026 to ensure a smooth leadership transition.

During her three-year tenure at Firstpost, Sharma played a key role in shaping the platformâs editorial identity. She was instrumental in launching the prime-time global affairs programme Vantage, which earned widespread recognition for explaining international developments through an Indian lens. Under her leadership, the show became one of Firstpostâs most prominent offerings and helped strengthen the brandâs global news positioning. Sharma also focused on building a strong editorial team and reinforcing journalistic standards within the organisation.

In an internal communication, Santosh Menon acknowledged Sharmaâs contribution, crediting her with elevating Firstpostâs editorial tone and expanding its international news footprint. As part of the restructuring, senior editor Binoy Prabhakar has been appointed Chief Content Officer to oversee content strategy going forward, while Rakesh Rai is set to take over as Managing Editor of News18.com.

Silence kills more than words.

Iâd rather get your ugly 3AM text than your quiet disappearance.

A late-night breakdown means youâre still here â still human, still reachable.

It means you trust someone enough to be raw and messy.

Silence is the slow eraser of relationships.
It removes answers, not feelings.

When you vanish without a fight, you teach people how to let you go.

When you reach out broken, you test loyalty.
You give someone the choice to stay.

Real friendship is answering the call, not applauding the highlight reel.

Real brothers donât tally the inconvenience; they show up when it hurts.

So send the text. Say the ugly thing. Break if you must.

And if he truly cares, he wonât hang up on the worst version of you.
Heâll stay until the morning makes you whole again.
